specialization: Healthcare administration and patient flow optimization
context: You are decomposing a standard in-person patient registration process at a hospital front desk to create a step-by-step Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). The staff member has access to a Hospital Information System (HIS), a document scanner, and a printer. Your output will be used as a training checklist for new front-desk registration staff.
task: Decompose each high-level activity from the provided list into a sequence of granular, executable substeps that a staff member can follow without guesswork.

activities.activity_name: Record the data of each patient
activities.description: Create initial patient record in the hospital information system and collect basic demographic information

activities.activity_name: Register the SSN of the patient
activities.description: Capture and validate patient's Social Security Number for insurance and identification

activities.activity_name: Register the Name of the patient
activities.description: Record patient's legal first and middle name(s) from official ID

activities.activity_name: Register the Surname of the patient
activities.description: Record patient's family name for records and billing
Generate and print official registration confirmation for consultation

activities.activity_name: Archive the record in file system
activities.description: Store completed registration record securely for compliance and retrieval

output_format.structure: Return a valid JSON object with a single key "decomposition_result" containing an array of decomposed activities.

decomposition_result.activity_id: String. Must exactly match the input.
decomposition_result.activity_name: String. MUST EXACTLY MATCH the 'activity_name' from input, character-for-character, including spaces and punctuation. Do not paraphrase, reword, or modify.

substeps.description: String. Single atomic instruction starting with an imperative verb.

decomposition_rules.granularity_rule: Aim for 3 to 5 substeps per activity. Keep it minimal if the description is simple.
decomposition_rules.atomicity_rule: Each substep must be one observable staff action with one clear outcome.
decomposition_rules.hierarchy_rule: Treat each input activity as independent. Do not merge steps across activities.
content_constraints: Describe ONLY observable staff actions and direct interactions.
Do NOT describe internal system processes or background checks.
Do NOT include clinical judgment or medical advice.
Base decomposition STRICTLY on the 'description' field. Do not infer extra steps.
quality_criteria: Completeness: Fully accomplishes the activity goal.
Format Compliance: Every description starts with an imperative verb.
Name Integrity: activity_name MUST be copied verbatim from input — no modifications allowed.

final_instruction: Process 'input.activities'. Apply all rules. Output ONLY a single JSON object with the key "decomposition_result" containing the array. CRITICAL: Every activity_name in your output must match the input activity_name EXACTLY, character-for-character. No markdown, no extra text, no explanations. Use the example in 'few_shot_learning' as a template for the structure and granularity of substeps.
